title: Klaviyo vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Sendinblue email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which is best for your business.
intro: Klaviyo and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both freemium email marketing platforms founded in 2012, but they serve different audiences. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands seeking predictive analytics and deep integrations, while Sendinblue offers a more affordable all-in-one CRM with generous free limits. Your choice depends on your industry, budget, and whether you need specialized e-commerce features or broader business tools.

comparison_table.tool_b: 300 free daily emails, WhatsApp, built-in CRM

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need specialized integrations
You want advanced predictive analytics and behavioral segmentation for marketing automation
You're willing to pay more for deeper feature depth and focus on customer profiling
choose_b_if: You need an extremely generous free tier with 100,000 free contacts
You want lower-cost paid plans starting at $25/month
You need transactional email, SMS, WhatsApp, and CRM tools in one all-in-one platform

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands needing advanced analytics and integrations, with a higher G2 rating (4.6 vs 4.5). Sendinblue is better if you prioritize affordability, a generous free tier, and want SMS/WhatsApp/CRM bundled together.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is cheaper overall. Its free tier allows 100,000 contacts versus Klaviyo's 500, and paid plans start at $25/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. For startups and small businesses, Sendinblue offers better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email templates. The migration process is straightforward—export your data as CSV from Sendinblue and import it into Klaviyo. Plan for workflow and automation recreation, as these settings don't transfer automatically.
